title: Verify accepting the Incentive Offer
description: Test that a user can successfully accept the discount offer during the cancellation flow.
preconditions: The Incentive Offer pop-up is displayed

steps.description: 1. On the offer pop-up, click the primary action button (e.g., 'Grab Offer' or 'Lock in 50% off...').
2. Complete the payment for the discounted amount.

expected_result: Payment is successful. The user's trial remains active, and their first month's subscription is scheduled to start at the discounted rate after the trial ends.
